source_indicator_name: Government expenditure on education, total (% of GDP)
definition_text: General government expenditure on education expressed as a percentage of GDP.

source_indicator_name: Government expenditure on education, total (% of government expenditure)
definition_text: General government expenditure on education expressed as a percentage of total government expenditure.

source_indicator_name: Literacy rate, adult total (% of people ages 15 and above)
definition_text: Share of adults age 15 and above who can read and write with understanding.

source_indicator_name: Completion rate, primary, total (% of relevant age group)
definition_text: Primary completion rate for the relevant age group.
GDP per capita based on constant 2015 U.S. dollars.
